calendar.matters:
Hearing On The Petition For Change Of Gender And Issuance Of New Birth Certificate.
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

The Court previously waived the appearance of petitioner and/or her counsel at today's hearing.
Proof of Publication not required.

No objections to the proposed change of gender and issuance of a new birth certificate were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female, and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.

Order Changing Name and Gender was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Ben Lunine, Esq. and Kristina Wertz, Esq. appeared with petitioner Gigi Marie Somers.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

After arguement by counsel and submission, the Court DENIED petitioner's request for Change of Gender and Issuance of a New Birth Certificate.

Counsel for petitioner to prepare a proposed Order After Hearing, and submit to the Court for review.
